{{Quote|Antilles, reporting in.|Antilles|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
'''Antilles''' was a member of the [[Mere Resistance]] around the time of the [[Occupation of Karthakk]]. He commanded a [[Mere cruiser]] during the battle with [[Cavik Toth]]'s [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] over [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].
